name: crataegus oxyacantha
title: best benefits of crataegus oxyacantha
description: Crataegus oxyacantha lowers cholesterol levels by reducing the levels of low-density lipoprotein (LDL), also known as "bad" cholesterol, in the blood. This benefit is crucial because high levels of LDL cholesterol can lead to the development of cardiovascular diseases, such as heart attacks and strokes, and can also contribute to atherosclerosis, a condition characterized by the buildup of plaque in the arteries.
